name: Zeratul
description: A stealthed Assassin who can dart around his enemies.
title: Dark Prelate
info: The enigmatic dark templar Zeratul serves the xel'naga. While he expertly wields the power of the Void, it is his wisdom that earns him the respect of the Koprulu sector's leaders - despite his penchant for dramatic entrances.

Zeratul.name: Cleave
Zeratul.description: Deal 200 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies.

Zeratul.name: Singularity Spike
Zeratul.description: Flings a Singularity Spike that sticks to the first enemy hit. Deals 240 (+4% per level) damage after 1 second and Slows the enemy by 40% for 3 seconds.

Zeratul.name: Blink
Zeratul.description: Teleport to the target location.  Using this Ability does not break Stealth.

Zeratul.name: Might Of The Nerazim
Zeratul.description: Activate to cast an untalented version of Zeratul's most recently used Basic Ability, dealing 50% less damage.  Passive: After using an Ability, Zeratul's next Basic Attack within 6 seconds deals 30% more damage.

Zeratul.name: Void Prison
Zeratul.description: Slows time in an area to a near standstill, placing allies and enemies in Time Stop for 5 seconds. Zeratul is not affected.

Zeratul.name: Permanent Cloak
Zeratul.description: Gain Stealth when out of combat for 3 seconds. Taking damage, attacking, using Abilities, or Channeling ends Stealth. Remaining stationary for at least 1.5 seconds while Stealthed grants Invisible.

Zeratul.name: Vorpal Blade
Zeratul.description: Activate to teleport to Zeratul's last non-structure Basic Attack target within 3 seconds. The target is revealed during these 3 seconds.

1.name: Greater Cleave
1.description: Increases the radius of Cleave by 33%.

1.name: Shadow Hunter
1.description: Quest: Gather Regeneration Globes to lower the Mana cost of Blink by 3, up to 45.  Reward: Upon gathering 15 Regeneration Globes, Basic Attacks reduce the cooldown of Blink by 1.5 seconds.

1.name: Move Unseen
1.description: Reduce the cooldown of Permanent Cloak by 1 second. Gain 30% Movement Speed while Stealthed.

4.name: Rending Cleave
4.description: Cleave deals an additional 40% damage over 3 seconds.

4.name: Psionic Strength
4.description: Dealing damage to enemy Heroes increases all damage dealt by 6% for 3 seconds, stacking up to 30%.

4.name: Darkness Descends
4.description: Activate to gain 40% Attack Speed for 5 seconds.  Passive: Gain 20% Attack Speed.

7.name: Wormhole
7.description: After 1.25 seconds, reactivate Blink to return to the point where it was cast from within 4 seconds.

7.name: Seeker in the Dark
7.description: Singularity Spike takes 50% longer to explode. It can be reactivated to teleport to the target, granting 30% increased Move Speed for 3 seconds.

7.name: Warp Skirmisher
7.description: Vorpal Blade gains a 2nd charge. Teleporting to an enemy with Vorpal Blade or entering Permanent Cloak causes Zeratul's next Basic Attack to deal 50% more damage.

10.name: Might Of The Nerazim
10.description: Activate to cast an untalented version of Zeratul's most recently used Basic Ability, dealing 50% less damage.  Passive: After using an Ability, Zeratul's next Basic Attack within 6 seconds deals 30% more damage.

10.name: Void Prison
10.description: Slows time in an area to a near standstill, placing allies and enemies in Time Stop for 5 seconds. Zeratul is not affected.

13.name: Shroud of Adun
13.description: Zeratul gains a Shield equal to 20% of his Maximum Health over 3 seconds while under Permanent Cloak.

13.name: Mending Strikes
13.description: Basic Attacks heal for 35% of the damage dealt.

13.name: Spell Shield
13.description: Every 30 seconds, gain 50 Spell Armor against the next enemy Ability and subsequent Abilities for 3 seconds, reducing the damage taken by 50%.  Can be toggled to allow or prevent this talent from triggering automatically.

16.name: Master Warp-Blade
16.description: Every third consecutive Basic Attack against the same target deals 125% more damage.

16.name: Void Slash
16.description: If Cleave hits more than one enemy Hero, it deals 40% increased damage and its cooldown is reduced by 3 seconds.

16.name: Sentenced to Death
16.description: Deal 25% increased damage to enemies while they are marked or Slowed by Singularity Spike.

20.name: Twilight Falls
20.description: Might of the Nerazim resets the cooldown of all Basic Abilities.

20.name: Unwavering Pressure
20.description: Singularity Spike no longer costs Mana. Basic Attacks against enemies reduce its cooldown by 1.25 seconds, double versus Heroes.

20.name: Shadow Stride
20.description: Reduce the cooldown of Vorpal Blade by 10 seconds. Casting Vorpal Blade grants Zeratul a Shield that absorbs up to 260 (+4% per level) damage for 3 seconds.

20.name: Shadow Mending
20.description: Heal for 60% of Spell Damage dealt to Heroes.

tooltipMarkup.GenericSpellShieldTalent: Every <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,SpellShieldCooldown,Duration"/></c> seconds, gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,SpellShieldActive,ArmorModification.ArmorSet[Hero].ArmorMitigationTable[Ability]"/></c> Spell Armor against the next enemy Ability and subsequent Abilities for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,SpellShieldActive,Duration" precision="1"/></c> seconds, reducing the damage taken by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,SpellShieldActive,ArmorModification.ArmorSet[Hero].ArmorMitigationTable[Ability]"/>%</c>.<n/><n/>Can be toggled to allow or prevent this talent from triggering automatically.
tooltipMarkup.ZeratulBlink: Teleport to the target location.<n/><n/>Using this Ability does not break Stealth.
tooltipMarkup.ZeratulCleave: Deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ZeratulCleaveDamage,Amount"/> </c>damage to nearby enemies.
tooltipMarkup.ZeratulCleaveGreaterCleaveTalent: Increases the radius of Cleave by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">33%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.ZeratulCleaveRendingCleaveTalent: Cleave deals an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> damage over <c val="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ZeratulDarknessDescends: Activate to gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,ZeratulDarknessDescendsAttackSpeedBuff,Modification.AdditiveAttackSpeedFactor"/>%</c> Attack Speed for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZeratulDarknessDescendsAttackSpeedBuff,Duration"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZeratulDarknessDescendsPassiveAttackSpeedBuff,Modification.AdditiveAttackSpeedFactor*100"/>%</c> Attack Speed.
tooltipMarkup.ZeratulMasterWarpBlade: Every third consecutive Basic Attack against the same target deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ZeratulHeroWeaponDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[ZeratulMasterWarpBlade].Modifier*100"/>%</c> more damage.
tooltipMarkup.ZeratulMendingStrikes: Basic Attacks heal for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZeratulMendingStrikesCarry,Modification.VitalDamageLeechArray[Life].KindArray[Basic]*100"/>%</c> of the damage dealt.
tooltipMarkup.ZeratulMoveUnseen: Reduce the cooldown of Permanent Cloak by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-1*Talent,ZeratulMoveUnseen,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"/></c> second. Gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,ZeratulMoveUnseenCarry,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> Movement Speed while Stealthed.
tooltipMarkup.ZeratulPermanentCloak: Gain Stealth when out of combat for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GenericCloakRevealer,Duration" player="0" precision="2"/></c> seconds. Taking damage, attacking, using Abilities, or Channeling ends Stealth. Remaining stationary for at least <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HeroGenericStationaryExtraStealthCountdown,Duration" precision="1"/></c> seconds while Stealthed grants Invisible.
tooltipMarkup.ZeratulPsionicStrength: Dealing damage to enemy Heroes increases all damage dealt by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Accumulator,ZeratulPsionicStrengthAccumulator,Scale"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZeratulPsionicStrengthDamageBonus,Duration"/></c> seconds, stacking up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZeratulPsionicStrengthTokenBehavior,Max * (100 * Accumulator,ZeratulPsionicStrengthAccumulator,Scale)"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.ZeratulSeekerInTheDark: Singularity Spike takes <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,ZeratulSeekerInTheDark,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value/Effect,ZeratulSingularitySpikeMissileImpactPersistent,PeriodCount*100"Player="0"/>%</c> longer to explode. It can be reactivated to teleport to the target, granting <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,ZeratulSingularitySpikeSeekerInTheDarkTalentMoveSpeedBuff,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> increased Move Speed for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZeratulSingularitySpikeSeekerInTheDarkTalentMoveSpeedBuff,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ZeratulSentencedtoDeath: Deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ZeratulCleaveDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[ZeratulSentencedToDeath].Modifier*100"/>%</c> increased damage to enemies while they are marked or Slowed by Singularity Spike.
tooltipMarkup.ZeratulShadowHunter: Quest: Gather Regeneration Globes to lower the Mana cost of Blink by , up to .Reward: Upon gathering Regeneration Globes, Basic Attacks reduce the cooldown of Blink by seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ZeratulShadowMending: Heal for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,ZeratulCleaveDamage,LeechFraction[Life]"/>%</c> of Spell Damage dealt to Heroes.
tooltipMarkup.ZeratulShadowStrideTalent: Reduce the cooldown of Vorpal Blade by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Talent,ZeratulShadowStrideTalent,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"/></c> seconds. Casting Vorpal Blade grants Zeratul a Shield that absorbs up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZeratulVorpalBladeShadowStrideShield,DamageResponse.ModifyLimit"/></c> damage for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZeratulVorpalBladeShadowStrideShield,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ZeratulShroudofAdun: Zeratul gains a Shield equal to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZeratulShroudofAdun,MaxStackCount*Behavior,ZeratulShroudofAdun,DamageResponse.ModifyLimitVitalMaxFractionArray[Life]*100"/>%</c> of his Maximum Health over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZeratulShroudofAdun,MaxStackCount*Behavior,ZeratulPermanentCloak,Period"/></c> seconds while under Permanent Cloak.
tooltipMarkup.ZeratulSingularitySpike: Flings a Singularity Spike that sticks to the first enemy hit. Deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ZeratulSingularitySpikeDamage,Amount"/></c> damage after <c val="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second and Slows the enemy by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,ZeratulSingularitySpikeSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZeratulSingularitySpikeSlow,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ZeratulTwilightFalls: Might of the Nerazim resets the cooldown of all Basic Abilities.
tooltipMarkup.ZeratulUnwaveringPressure: Singularity Spike no longer costs Mana. Basic Attacks against enemies reduce its cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,ZeratulSingularitySpikeUnwaveringPressureModifyCooldown,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"Precision="2"/></c> seconds, double versus Heroes.
tooltipMarkup.ZeratulVoidPrison: Slows time in an area to a near standstill, placing allies and enemies in Time Stop for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="[d ref='Behavior,VoidPrisonDomeBehavior,PeriodCount' player='0'/] * Behavior,VoidPrisonDomeBehavior,Period" precision="2"/></c> seconds. Zeratul is not affected.
tooltipMarkup.ZeratulVoidSlashTalent: If Cleave hits more than one enemy Hero, it deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,ZeratulCleaveDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[ZeratulVoidSlash].Modifier"/>%</c> increased damage and its cooldown is reduced by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,ZeratulCleaveVoidSlashTalentModifyCooldown,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ZeratulVorpalBladeHotbar: Activate to teleport to Zeratul's last non-structure Basic Attack target within <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,VorpalBladeDebuff,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds. The target is revealed during these <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,VorpalBladeDebuff,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ZeratulWarpSkirmisher: Vorpal Blade gains a <c val="#TooltipNumbers">2nd</c> charge. Teleporting to an enemy with Vorpal Blade or entering Permanent Cloak causes Zeratul's next Basic Attack to deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,ZeratulWarpSkirmisherDamageProcBuff,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Basic]"/>%</c> more damage.
tooltipMarkup.ZeratulWormholeTalent: After <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ZeratulBlinkWormholeTalentCoolupModifyUnit,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"Precision="2"/></c> seconds, reactivate Blink to return to the point where it was cast from within <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ZeratulBlinkWormholeTalentTimedLife,Duration"/></c> seconds.
